caption: A man with a tall, silver-grey pompadour hairstyle, glasses, and headphones speaks into a black microphone. He wears a white collared shirt with a red bow tie and tan suspenders. The setting is a shop featuring clothing racks and framed photos on the wall; in the background, a woman with pink hair wearing a green top is visible. A logo in the bottom left reads "#FASHIONTALK PODCAST" and red text on the right reads "FASHION TALK 101". Across the sequence, the man shifts his head and gaze, moving from looking forward to glancing down and then slightly to the side as he continues speaking. The background remains static, showing a sign that says "UNIQUE FASHION" and a framed yellow shield emblem on the wall.
